full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 10E6 cells/vial total 3 vials

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5E6 cells/vial total 3 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.75 | 2.88
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.61 | 1.90
 | viability [%] | 45.3 | 66.0
 | size [µm] | 9.7 | 8.8
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 6.21 | 3.48
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.76 | 2.04
 | viability [%] | 44.4 | 58.7
 | size [µm] | 8.8 | 8.5
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.98 | 3.18
total | total [E6 cells] | 29.9 in 5 ml | 15.9 in 5 ml
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.685 | 1.97
total | live [E6 cells] | 13.42 in 5 ml | 9.85 in 5 ml
 | viability [%] | 44.85 | 62.35
